posts.text:
I’ve just snagged a couple Yubikeys for adding some hardware based auth to my personal nerd setup. 

I’m curious, anyone else using a hardware key (yubikey or otherwise), how do you best take advantage of them?

iOS 27 beta on my old iPhone 12 mini is giving flashbacks of iOS 17 betas: overheating, sluggish interface. Some Apple process is definitely running rampant in the background. I already disabled Enhanced Visual Search, no help. I went from 75% to 69 (nice) while writing this 

Shows me right for running a beta on my personal device 🤦
Terraform/OpenTofu homelab users: what do you use to store state?
